hint1: Start on the left: create or open a project to compose papers, manage the bank, and edit the map.
hint2: Use Manual in the sidebar when you need help.
title: Welcome
intro: Pick how to enter a project; you can switch modules from the sidebar anytime.
newProjectDialogIntro: Choose a parent folder, enter a project name, and pick a starting layout.
templateEmptyDesc: Standard folders only; you add everything else.
templateMathDesc: Sample bank, graph, and common paper layouts to get started.
pickParentTitle: Choose parent folder for the new project
recentEmpty: No entries yet. Open a project to see it here next time.
